title: telemetry — HTTP routes
description: Debug + operational surface for the SRE team. Not tenant-facing. Consolidated from the previously separate /api/v1/platform/telemetry-otel/* and /api/v1/platform/telemetry-logs/* prefixes under a single /api/v1/platform/telemetry/*.

routes.description: Live pipeline status across all three signals: exporter latency, sampled ratio, dropped spans, dropped log records, buffer depth per sink.
Compiled SpanRegistry + MetricRegistry + LogContextRegistry. Filter with ?signal=traces|metrics|logs to scope.
Fires a synthetic trace + metric to the configured exporter. Returns exporter round-trip time.
Emits a synthetic log record at each level to the configured sink for smoke testing.
